research_sources.source: Microsoft Learn - Tips for designing a great Power BI dashboard
research_sources.applied: Most important information top-left, one-screen story, clean/uncluttered cards, consistent colors and simple comparisons.

research_sources.source: Microsoft Learn - Create custom report themes in Power BI Desktop
research_sources.applied: Theme JSON includes data colors, status colors, structural colors, and primary text classes.

research_sources.source: Supermetrics - Power BI marketing dashboard examples
research_sources.applied: Marketing campaign layout covers spend, revenue, conversions, paid vs organic performance, campaign ranking, and executive CMO summary.
Budget optimization layout highlights cost spikes, diminishing returns, performance improvements, and channel/campaign/time filters.
Operational marketing dashboards should focus on one subject, choose charts by message, add context, and clearly outline actions.
